author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Pythia-70M architecture test (Experiment 6) with GPT-NeoX parallel attention+MLP blocks, RoPE, causal masking, untied embedding/unembedding, AdamW with beta2=0.95. 132K params, loss 6.73→1.50 over 10 steps. Exercises: Embedding, RoPE apply, chunk (QKV split), view (head reshape), permute (K transpose), bmm (attention), softmax, div (scaling), add (residual+causal mask), LayerNorm, Linear, CrossEntropy, AdamW.
